prompt: Evaluate the described field condition and return the appropriate decision with supporting observations.
scenario: M-201 Shaft alignment is reported as intermittent, but the clip starts after the symptom has stopped. No trend log, load reading, or repeat test is included, so the failure mode cannot be separated from normal cycling. Source anchors for review: API 686, laser system manuals.
title: T1 M-201 Insufficient evidence Fault diagnosis
